description:
Rewrite the BICC homepage hero (cover section) to reframe BICC as a
construction & project management partner rather than the previous
generic "trusted partner for comprehensive services" tagline. New H1
reads "Your Construction & Project Management Partner in Iloilo",
with a lead paragraph naming the service lines (vertical builds,
roads, demolition, end-to-end project management) and two CTAs
anchoring to existing on-page sections (#our-services and
#contact-us). Sections below the cover (OUR SERVICES, ABOUT US,
CONTACT US) are preserved verbatim from the production baseline.
